invariants.claim: Fungible/xUDT semantics live outside NovaSeal core.
Every signed xUDT profile intent commits to NovaSealCanonicalEnvelopeV0.
Only the issuer authority may create a new xUDT balance object.
invariants.location: issue_xudt issuer_sig.pubkey guard and BIP340 verifier call

invariants.claim: Only the current holder authority may transfer the balance object.
invariants.location: transfer_xudt holder_sig.pubkey guard and BIP340 verifier call

invariants.claim: Transfer preserves the whole balance amount and xUDT type hash.
Settlement consumes an active balance object and emits a terminal receipt with new_amount = 0.
Transfer and settlement increment nonce exactly once and reject u64 overflow.
Issue -> transfer -> settle must execute on live devnet before V1 readiness.
